subject:
Re: Can't run. The message("there was an error loading the
 specified boxnet model for picking) pops up
body:
Dear Donghyun,

is it possible that you have some non-Latin characters in the path to the 
BoxNet model folder? I just tried including a Korean character in the 
folder name, and it appears TensorFlow can't handle it properly. I'm afraid 
the only immediate workaround would be to make sure the paths are 
all-Latin. I'll look into modifying the TensorFlow interface, but this 
might take a while and there is no guarantee I will succeed.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Thursday, July 5, 2018 at 9:55:15 AM UTC+2, kukudas wrote:
>
> When i click the "Start pressing", The message("there was an error loading 
> the specified boxnet model for picking) pops up. How do i overcome this 
> problem?
> Please help me.....
>
>
> <https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-4rv9JeVSc4s/Wz3O0VH4FHI/AAAAAAAAALc/bkB-Lmv9UW0zcJGfKfBYKSSlWFn2ncx3ACLcBGAs/s1600/KakaoTalk_20180705_164205200.jpg>
>
